### Environment

- OS / arch: e.g. macOS 14 arm64, Ubuntu 24.04 x86_64, Windows 11
- Provider (if AI-related): e.g. mock / openai / anthropic / local

### Logs

Paste the relevant node log tail (last ~50 lines). Logs live at
`dev-data/<run>/<node>.log` and `dev-data/<run>/<node>.err.log`.
Redact any tokens or API keys before posting.

```text
<paste here>
```

### Additional context

Anything else — flow file, config snippet, screenshot.
